name: Tiger Shark (Female)
description:
The female version of a Tiger Shark from Sharkco! This one has been tweaked significantly! By that, I mean the scenario includes a (somewhat) descriptive description of the Entities so that you can include them in chats!

Please, send a review on whether the additional information should be reverted back or it should stay the same!

!!! THIS IS NOT A KAIJU PARADISE CHARACTER; THIS IS A CHARACTER FROM SHARKCO !!!
I really recommend you roleplay to as a character listed in the scenario!! Obviously you may have to do some research on the Roblox wiki to be accurate with details that could be included in your system prompts!
creator: TheNarrator
